query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `blog_categories` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `blog_categories_slug_unique` (`slug`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `blog_categories` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `sortOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `blog_categories_slug_unique` (`slug`)
);
